title: mentha longifolia var. gracilis
intro: Mentha longifolia var. gracilis, commonly known as Horsemint, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Mentha longifolia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of menthol and other volatile oils, which provide a range of health benefits. The health benefits of Horsemint include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. Horsemint can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
